content:
Hello,

I got a message about a user that can't install my plugin on his Mac M3 :

The following plugin has encountered errors during startup:
NmeaGenerator
This plugin will be uninstalled. You might want to reinstall it after updating the catalog.
The following library has encountered errors during startup:
/Users/mike/Library/Application Support/OpenCPN/Contents/PlugIns/libnmeagenerator_pi.dylib
The library will be removed. You might want to reinstall it’s associated plugin after updating the catalog.

The tarball (macos-universal) was generated by CircleCI. Build script was copied from ShipDriver.

Any idea if it's an issue from the CircleCI build ? From my plugin ?
If someone with a MacOS could test the install that would be very kind ! (v1.0.0 in catalogue, and v1.1.0 in cloudsmith alpha repo : https://cloudsmith.io/~kupoftyopencpn/repos/nmeagenerator-alpha/packages/)
